plugin.name: Sequence Auditor
plugin.description: Audit a folder listing or an Excel column for missing numbered items and export the result.
title: Sequence Auditor
description: Switch between folder mode and Excel mode to audit missing numbered entries and export a workbook with context rows.
summary.empty: Choose a mode and source path.
dialog.error.title: Missing Input
dialog.error.missing_path: Choose a source folder or workbook.
dialog.error.missing_column: Enter the Excel column name to inspect.
summary.success: Found {row_count} result rows in {mode} mode. Previewing the first {preview_count} rows.
log.task.success: Generated sequence audit report in {mode} mode
